MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia M. Evezich. John P. Zanghi, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Founders Realty Incorporated. There being no appearance by Defendant, Daniel Moorehouse, the court ordered the matter off settlement, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
